claim: Mission Studio V27 provides a front-and-center one-box interface, Ask GoalOS chat, solved use-case playbooks, and complete navigation preservation.
boundary: No user data. No user funds. No wallet. No transaction. No network call. No production authority. Human review required.

useCases.title: Understand GoalOS in 10 minutes
useCases.objective: I am new and want the fastest path to understand GoalOS.
useCases.why: Get the thesis, the trust boundary, and the shortest route through the proof surface.

useCases.title: Learn the 48 Ethereum Mainnet contracts
useCases.objective: I want to understand the 48 Ethereum Mainnet contracts.
useCases.why: Learn the public proof rail without a wallet or Solidity knowledge.
useCases.outcome: A user can explain the contract suite safely.

useCases.title: Run a public-safe proof mission
useCases.objective: I want to run a public-safe proof mission.
useCases.why: Turn a normal objective into a Mission Contract and Evidence Docket plan.
useCases.gate: No sensitive data, no production action

useCases.title: Evaluate an AI vendor or tool using evidence
useCases.objective: I want to evaluate an AI vendor or tool using evidence, not marketing claims.
useCases.why: Separate claims from proof before adoption or procurement.
useCases.outcome: A defensible adoption or rejection memo.

useCases.title: Design a controlled pilot program
useCases.objective: I want to design a controlled pilot where every serious pilot ends with a docket.
useCases.why: A real pilot needs criteria, baselines, acceptance records, and follow-up status.
useCases.outcome: A pilot that can be audited and improved.

useCases.title: Understand Loop to RSI governance
useCases.objective: I want to understand Loop to RSI governance.
useCases.why: Loops become safer when they write state, restart, expose bottlenecks, compare baselines, and package breakthroughs as dossiers.
useCases.gate: Search control is not outcome authority
useCases.outcome: A clear Loop → RSI learning path.

useCases.title: Check privacy, token, and data boundaries
useCases.objective: I want to check privacy, token, and data boundaries.
useCases.why: Confirm the site does not ask for data, funds, wallets, transactions, or sensitive material.
useCases.gate: No data, no funds, no wallet

useCases.title: Review or replay a proof claim
useCases.objective: I want to review or replay a GoalOS proof claim.
useCases.why: A proof claim should point to baselines, packets, replay path, gates, risk, and claim boundary.
useCases.outcome: Reviewer can accept, reject, or challenge.

useCases.title: Turn accepted work into reusable capability
useCases.objective: I want to turn accepted work into reusable capability.
useCases.why: Verified work should become a reusable package only after proof and review.

useCases.title: Audit website and repository completeness
useCases.objective: I want to audit website and repository completeness.
useCases.why: Keep a large proof site navigable, complete, claim-bounded, and route-health checked.
useCases.gate: No missing route, no stale boundary
useCases.outcome: Maintainer can see what needs review.

useCases.title: Plan a defensive cybersecurity proof mission
useCases.objective: I want to plan a defensive cybersecurity proof mission.
useCases.why: Security work must stay defensive, repo-owned, bounded, human-reviewed, and evidence-backed.

useCases.title: Prepare an executive decision brief
useCases.objective: I want an executive decision brief for GoalOS adoption.
useCases.why: Leaders need a short path from uncertainty to justified action.
useCases.outcome: An executive-ready summary with proof routes.

useCases.title: Create a proof-backed procurement record
useCases.objective: I want a proof-backed procurement record for an AI system.
useCases.why: Procurement should capture claims, validation status, boundaries, and monitoring.

useCases.title: Audit a research or strategic claim
useCases.objective: I want to audit a research or strategic claim before sharing it.
useCases.why: Strong claims require baselines, replay, evidence, limitations, and claim boundaries.
useCases.gate: No Evidence Docket, no strong empirical claim

useCases.title: Prepare a validator council review session
useCases.objective: I want to prepare a validator council review session.
useCases.why: Trust is not one judge; it needs roles, dissent, gates, replay, and decision state.

useCases.title: Map a strategic opportunity into a proof mission
useCases.objective: I want to turn a strategic opportunity into a proof mission.
useCases.why: Opportunities become useful only when converted into missions, evidence requirements, gates, and next actions.
useCases.outcome: A strategy becomes a proof-backed path.
